name: Miniature Yule Logs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the first six ingredients (water, egg yolks, sugar, salt, dry yeast, and lemon juice).
2. In another bowl, mix together 4 cups of sifted flour and 1/2 pound of butter until crumbly.
3. Gradually add the first mixture to the flour-butter mixture and combine until a pie crust consistency is achieved. Adjust with more flour if too thin or water if too thick.
4. Refrigerate while preparing the filling.
5. Beat 3 egg whites until stiff.
6. In a separate bowl, beat 1/2 to 3/4 cup of your favorite jelly or jam (e.g., raspberry jam).
7. Gently fold in 1/2 cup chopped nuts and 2 tablespoons of bread crumbs into the filling.
8. Roll out the dough on a sugared surface until about 1/8 inch to 1/4 inch thick. Cut into squares measuring 2 inches to 3 inches.
9. Place a small amount of filling at one end of each square, roll up, and place cut side down in an ungreased pan.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes until golden brown.
11. Allow to cool before removing from the pan.
12. Decorate with two green leaves and a red rosette on top, centered along the length.
